titleStmt.title: SII 24.500: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 500. (A.R. No. 137 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, KITCHEN, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by Parāṅkuśayyaṉ of Dharmapuri (cf. No. 499 above) after purchasing it from Anan ••• son of Vīrēśvara Bhaṭṭar of Puravichēri, towards food offerings to the God on the occasion of His halt at Tirukkuṟaḷappaṉ-kōyil-maṇḍapam with the Nāchchiyār on the ninth day of the Brahmōtsava. Incomplete. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1501, Pramādi, Mithuna, śu. 10, Thursday, ••• correspond to 1579, A.D. June 4, Thursday, ·61, nakshatra Chittirai, ·70.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ śubhamastu . svastiśrīman makārājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran śrīvirapratāpa śrīvira śrīraṅgayadevamahārāyar pṛthuvirājyam paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 5 100 1 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa pramādisamvatsarattu [mithuna] nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu daśamiyum bṛhaspativāramum
⎯⎯tivaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkat tiruppatip perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar [śrīpaṇ] ṭārattukku tirumalai nampi ṣē n dharmmapuri cāttāta parāṅkuśa saṉeṉ daṇḍan samarppittup poliyūṭṭu ccilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi . Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Ubhaiyamāka naṭakkiṟa poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷaikku puraviceri vireśvarabhaṭṭar putran Aṉan kaiyil tina pon koṇṭu tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamākac cetta coḻamaṇṭalac cirmaiyil
⎯⎯ṇan vāḻuñceri grāmattil nilam2- likku Irekaippaṭi poṉ 2 10 5- kku Aṭiyeṉuṭaiya Ubhaiyamāka naṭakkiṟa poliyūṭṭuk kaṭṭaḷai Ātibrahmāvi ḷ Oṉpatān tirunāḷ perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār koyilil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu Amutu ceytaruḷum tanam taḷikai Appam ḷa Āka 2 10 tirukkuṟaḷappaṉ koyilil EḻuntaruḷiIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 24.500 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
